your_files: dirty_equals/_other.py,dirty_equals/__init__.py
note: OK, we both need to touch these two shared files (IsPhoneNumber vs IsHash). To minimize merge conflicts: in _other.py I'll add my IsPhoneNumber class at the END of the file; please add your IsHash class also as a new class not touching existing code (e.g. also appended, or before mine, just don't edit lines I'm not touching). In __init__.py I'll only add 'IsPhoneNumber' to the _other import line and to __all__ under the '# other' section; please do the same for IsHash in the same spots - alphabetically 'IsHash' comes before 'IsPhoneNumber' before 'IsUUID' so let's both just add our name into the existing import tuple/list, git merge should handle adjacent line additions fine. I'll git merge your branch in before final patch. Accepting this split.
